channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Colombia vs DR Congo: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Colombia vs DR Congo for free online and from anywhere as los Cafeteros and the Leopards chase the World Cup 2026 knockout phase.

item.title: 117 Prime Day Deals on Gear We’ve Tested and Would Spend Our Own Money On
item.description: We've gone from A to Z to find Amazon's best Prime Day deals on the gear worth owning.

item.title: The Nex Playground is down to its pre-RAMageddon price during Prime Day
item.description: The Nex Playground is the family-centric, Kinect-like game console that made one Verge editor’s kids laugh, cry, and ask for more playtime, even when they were sick. The motion-based game play isn’t perfect, but it has won over plenty of parents — and it’s on sale for $239 at Amazon, down from its current MSRP […]

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, June 24 (game #843)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, June 24 (game #1612)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, June 24 (game #1109)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Prime Day mini PC deal: My daughter wanted a mini PC for school, and this is the most powerful one I could find under $500
item.description: After studying all the options, this is the one I landed on for the back to school season.

item.title: Not sure if a Kindle Colorsoft is worth the cash? Here are 4 alternative color ereaders to consider — including a 5-star standout
item.description: In the world of color ereaders, it's not all about the Kindle...

item.title: The LG UltraGear 5K2K is my dream ultrawide gaming monitor — but there’s one big reason why I’m holding off from upgrading
item.description: LG's UltraGear 5K2K ultrawide is a delight for any PC gamer, but there's a strong alternative on the horizon that should give every PC gamer a reason to wait.

item.title: I review tech for a living, and these are the 7 essential tech buys I'd recommend for your summer travels
item.description: Preparing for your summer travels? These are the essential tech buys I'd recommend to everyone.

item.title: Google Home will soon get better at recognizing you
item.description: A new update for Google Home could make it less likely your smart home cameras mistake you for someone else, just because you're facing away from the camera. Starting June 23rd, Google's expanding its facial recognition feature so that people you've tagged in your Familiar Faces library can continue to be identified when their faces […]

item.title: Hollywood is bending the knee to OpenAI
item.description: Netflix, A24, Focus Features, and Warner Bros.' Clockwork have all reportedly decided to pass on picking up Artificial - director Luca Guadagnino's new biographical drama about OpenAI cofounder / CEO Sam Altman - for distribution deals. And while Neon and Mubi are still said to be interested in the film, this situation makes it seem […]

item.title: Ring doorbells are going cheap for Prime Day, but these 5 subscription-free alternatives could cost you less in the long run
item.description: Get all the features you'd expect from a premium video doorbell, without having to pay a monthly fee.

item.title: Quote of the day by Apple CEO Tim Cook: 'Our own information is being weaponized against us with military efficiency' — a scathing critique of the modern advertising data pipeline
item.description: The rise of big data and analytics has been a boon for businesses – but there's a dark side to the power that it grants

item.title: 'I've never had such easy access to ice cream headaches, and I'm over the moon about it': I use the Ninja BlendBoss every day, and its ice-crushing power is a godsend right now — and it’s just received its first major discount
item.description: Ninja's smart blender makes instant slushies, but in a super-small footprint — and obviously it's great for other stuff too

item.title: From Prime Day Apple Watch deals to record discounts on Garmins, these are the 24 smartwatch deals you need to see right now
item.description: Everything you need to pick your next wearable, whether you want a hardy trail companion, a smart way to field notifications or a cheap fitness tracker.

item.title: Superhuman acquires AI detection startup GPTZero
item.description: Superhuman, which also has an AI detection tool as part of Grammarly, has snapped up GPTZero.

item.title: The ultimate Prime Day Apple deals guide: Were tracking prices on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: The best Prime Day Apple deals include record lows on the AirPods Max 2, the Apple Watch Series 11, and the M3 MacBook Air.

item.title: Amazon devices are up to 65% off on Prime Day — shop Fire TVs and Kindles on sale
item.description: Shop Amazon devices during Prime Day. Fire TVs, Blink security cameras, and more are up to 65% off during the sale's June 23 start.

item.title: Back to school: my pick of the 4 best ANC headphones for studying — affordable, durable noise-cancelling cans this Prime Day
item.description: Because Prime Day is here, and even if you're not into 'back to school' headlines, you will be into the headphones —and the deals.

item.title: We're tracking the best Prime Day tech deals live — 101 biggest discounts on Apple, Samsung, Kindle, Sony, and more
item.description: It's day one of Amazon's Prime Day sale, and we're tracking the best tech deals, including up to 60% off TVs, Apple devices, laptops, smart home gadgets, and more.

item.title: Prime Day 2026: Live updates on Apple, Samsung, DJI, Kindle, and more Amazon deals
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on AirPods, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: The 16 Best Amazon Prime Day Deals Under $30 We've Found
item.description: Everything is expensive. Treat yourself to one of these WIRED-tested and -approved Prime Day picks under $30.

item.title: Google a planqué une super amélioration audio dans Android 17, sans le dire à personne
item.description: Android 17 cache une petite pépite pour les oreilles exigeantes : la prise en charge du codec LHDC, qui débride le son sans fil des Pixel. Google n'en a pas soufflé mot, et il faut aller la dénicher au fond des réglages.

item.title: I've tested Apple's biggest products — these are the 10 Prime Day deals I'd buy
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day 2026 is in full swing, and I’ve rounded up the 10 best Apple deals worth buying right now across AirTags, AirPods, Apple Watch, iPad, and Mac.
